allow: Bash(cmd /c "where nuget & dotnet nuget locals all --list" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$dll = 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Steam\\steamapps\\common\\Slay the Spire 2\\data_sts2_windows_x86_64\\sts2.dll'
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(\\$dll\)
\\$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString\(\\$bytes\)
\\$results = [regex]::Matches\(\\$text, '[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]{3,80}'\) | ForEach-Object { \\$_.Value } | Where-Object { \\$_ -match 'Architect' } | Select-Object -Unique
\\$results
")
